title: Megathil Ondrai Nindrome Lyrics Kadhal Sadugudu
stanzas:
<div>
<div>
Megathil Ondrai Nindrome Lyrics Kadhal Sadugudu

Megathil ondraai
nindrome anbe
mazhai neeraai sidhari
pogindrom anbe (2)

privenbathaal nenjile
baaram illai.
mazhai enbadhu
neerukku maranam illai.

meendum oru naal
megam aagi
vaanil serndhiduvom.
iruvar koodi
oru thuli aagi
muththaai maariduvom.

Megathil ondraai
nindrome anbe
mazhai neeraai sidhari
pogindrom anbe

kannai kavvum
un kangalai kadhalithen
karpai thodum un
paarvaiyai kadhalithen
asai konda un aanmaiyai
kadhalithen
meesai konda un
menmaiyai kathalithen.

nila vizhum un
vizhigalai kathalithen
nilam vizhum
un nizhalaiyum kadhalithen
netri thodum un
mudigalai kadhalithen
nenjai moodum
un udaigalai kathalithen.

kannaa silanaal pirivom
athanaal uravaa seththuvidum
kadal neer konjam
megam aanaal
kadalaa vattrividum

veliyoor pogum
kaatrum orunaal
veettukku thirumbi varum.
pirithal enbathu
ilaiyuthir kaalam
nichchiyam vasantham varum.

Megathil ondraai
nindrome anbe
mazhai neeraai sidhari
pogindrom anbe

anbae anbae unai
enganam pirinthiruppen
nilaa vandhaal
en iravugal erindhiruppen
unnai ennai
en uyir thalam udainthiruppen
kannaal kandaal
naan irumurai uyirtharippen.

anbe anbe unai
enganam marandhiruppen
nitham nitham un
kanavukkul idam pidippen
penne penne
nam pirinivil thunaiyiruppen
kanne kanne
en kangalai anuppi vaippen

iththanai pirivu
thagumaa endru
iyarkaiyai kandikkiren.

yaenthaan avarai kandaai
endru kangalai thandikkiren

piriyum podhum piriyam
valarum pirindhe santhippom
vazhkai enbathu vattachaalai
meendum sandhippom

Megathil ondraai
nindrome anbe
mazhai neeraai sidhari
pogindrom anbe

privenbathaal nenjile
baaram illai.
mazhai enbadhu
neerukku maranam illai.

meendum oru naal
megam aagi
vaanil serndhiduvom.
iruvar koodi
oru thuli aagi
muththaai maariduvom.

enrichedMetadata.summary: In Megathil Ondrai Nindrome, the lyrics beautifully express the feelings of love and longing, making it a heartfelt melody. The song captures the essence of romantic moments, evoking emotions of nostalgia and warmth. It speaks of togetherness and the joy of shared experiences, making it perfect for celebrations of love. The soothing tune and poetic lyrics create a serene atmosphere, ideal for relaxation and reflection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Megathil Ondrai Nindrome is a beautifully crafted melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. The song's enchanting lyrics and soothing rhythm make it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. Experience the magic of this timeless piece that resonates with every heart, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: We are like a single cloud in the sky, my love, and the rain is pouring down, my love.
There is no burden in my heart due to the separation. Rain does not mean death for water.
One day we will become a cloud and join the sky. Together, we will transform into a drop of rain.
We are like a single cloud in the sky, my love, and the rain is pouring down, my love.
I have fallen in love with your eyes, I have fallen in love with your gaze, I have fallen in love with your soul, I have fallen in love with your beauty.

I have fallen in love with your eyes that shine like the moon, I have fallen in love with your shadow that falls on the ground, I have fallen in love with your feet that touch the earth, I have fallen in love with your body that captivates my heart.
If we separate for a while, it will create a bond, and if love becomes a cloud, it will rain a little.
The wind that blows outside will return home one day. Separation is not forever; spring will come again.
We are like a single cloud in the sky, my love, and the rain is pouring down, my love.
My love, how will I be separated from you? If the moon comes, my nights will be empty without you. If I see you, I will regain my life.
My love, how will I forget you? Every day, I will find a place in your dreams. My dear, in our separation, I will be your companion. I will send my eyes to you.
I wonder if this separation is natural or not.
I have given my eyes to see you.
Separation will grow when it is time to part, but life will bring us together again.
We are like a single cloud in the sky, my love, and the rain is pouring down, my love.
There is no burden in my heart due to the separation. Rain does not mean death for water.
One day we will become a cloud and join the sky. Together, we will transform into a drop of rain.
